resources.string: Every change you make — and every change synced from elsewhere — shows up here, newest first.
Enabling the Assistant sends your decrypted item content to a third-party AI sub-processor so it can read and act on your tasks. You can turn it off at any time.
Couldn't apply the change. Try again.
Couldn't enable the Assistant. Try again.
The Assistant isn't available on this device yet.
A secure browser window opens to finish signing in.
You can close this tab and return to the app.
That token isn't valid. Check it and try again.
Couldn't reach Deferno. Check your connection and try again.
Your sign-in for this account has ended. Sign in again to continue.
Create a token in Deferno on the web: Settings → Tokens.
Check your connection and try again.
Speak freely and Deferno will turn it into draft tasks. Brain dump is available on Android; desktop support is on the way.
Drafts will appear in your Inbox
Transcribing in the background — we'll let you know when your drafts are ready in the Inbox.
Speak or type whatever's on your mind. I'll draft trees from it — nothing's added until you accept them in your Inbox.
Listening for what's on your mind. Tap to stop when you're done — I'll draft from it.
Brain dump needs microphone access, which is turned off for this app.
Ready to draft from what you typed
This recording couldn't be turned into tasks, so it's saved here for you to review.
Added a prerequisite to do first: “%1$s”.
I couldn't quite work that out on-device. Want to say it a different way?
Sounds like you keep putting it off. Do you actually need this? I can take “%1$s” off your list — just say yes.
Done — taking “%1$s” off your list. You can recover it from history.
All set — we cleared what you didn't need.
Everything's broken down and ready. Nice work.
Kept it. So — what's stopping you from “%1$s”?
Something more pressing right now — noted. (Lowering its priority is coming soon; for now it stays put.)
Let's name the first small piece — what's one part you could start on?
That's temporary — it's okay to skip it for now. It still mattered to you, so it'll be here when you're ready.
Sounds like it's blocked by something else — noted. (Linking that blocker is coming soon.)
Define what “done” looks like, and decide if I'm the right person or should delegate
Figure out how to do this
Turn on an inference engine in Settings → Agent to break a stuck task into smaller steps.
A clear day. Add something when you're ready — no pressure.
This app is out of date — please update.
Session expired — sign in again to refresh.
Couldn't prepare the attachments. Try again.
You're offline — reconnect to send. Nothing was queued.
Brain-dump drafts land here for you to review. Speak a brain dump and Deferno turns it into draft tasks for this list.
Triage at your pace — nothing's lost.
Review each one — add it as a task, or dismiss it. Nothing's deleted.
Dictation needs microphone access. Tap the mic to allow it.
Dictation needs microphone access, which is turned off for this app.
Dictation needs microphone access, which is turned off for Deferno.
Couldn't hear that — try the mic again.
You choose the kind here — Deferno never guesses it on New.
You're offline — reconnect to save. Nothing was queued.
Saves online · you can change anything later
Nothing scheduled for today. Add something when you're ready — no pressure.
Pause · take a break whenever you need
Just this. The rest is put away.
If you're not sure, start here
IF YOU'RE NOT SURE, START HERE

plurals.name: plan_today_subtitle
plurals.item: 1 tree you picked. Start wherever feels right.
%1$d trees you picked. Start wherever feels right.

resources.string: You're in charge. Tap whichever feels doable — I just lined up a few ideas.
A quick win, if you want momentum
Your sign-in for this account has ended. Sign in again to refresh your details.
This removes this account and its data from this device. You'll need to sign in again to use it here.
Your profile details couldn't load. Check your connection and try again.
Type at least two characters to find anything by title.
Type at least two characters to find tasks by title or description.
Nothing matched your search. Try a different word or fewer filters.

The Agent can turn a brain dump into draft tasks and suggest changes to your plan. Choose which engine it uses — or turn it off. An on-device engine keeps your text on this device; Deferno's cloud AI sends it off your device to generate proposals (you always review before anything is saved). It's off by default, and this choice stays on this device, not synced to your account.
Sends your text off-device to Deferno's hosted AI
Premium — not available for your account yet
The Agent stays off. Nothing is sent anywhere.
The Assistant is available on iPhone for now. It's coming to Android soon.
Connect Deferno with the other tools you use. Integrations are on the way.
Two-factor authentication and security are managed by your identity provider. We'll bring these controls into the app soon.
Export your tasks and lists as a backup file you can save or share.
Export and import run in the Deferno web app — there's no in-app endpoint yet. Open the web app to manage your data.
How long completed items stay visible.
Have a question, a bug, or a suggestion? Send it straight to the Deferno team — attach files if it helps.

Hello,
I'd like to request removal of my Deferno account and its associated data.
Account email:
Thank you.
Deferno is built on open-source software, with thanks to its authors.
Your data stays yours. We never sell it. See the full privacy policy on the web.
By using Deferno you agree to our Terms of Service and acceptable-use policy.
Manage Deferno's notifications, storage, and other permissions in your device settings.
Dictation for capturing tasks by voice. Audio is recognized on-device.
Alerts you when a brain dump finishes processing in the background.
Help improve Deferno by sharing anonymous usage data.
That didn't go through. Check your connection and try again.
No other devices are signed in.
This removes your authenticator app, recovery codes, and email backup. Your account will be protected by your password only.
Add Deferno to your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
That code didn't match. Enter the current code from your app.
Protect your account with an authenticator app: each sign-in will also ask for a 6-digit code.
If you lose your authenticator, a recovery code is the only way back into your account. Each code works once. Store them somewhere safe.
%1$s will be signed out and will need to sign in through the browser again.
Enter your account password to continue.
That password didn't match. Try again.
Replacing also regenerates your recovery codes.
Security settings couldn't be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
Choose how dictation turns your voice into text. This stays on this device and isn't synced to your account.
Use the best engine available on this device

Choose where your attachments are stored. On-device keeps the files on this device and works offline. This choice stays on this device and isn't synced to your account. (Feedback you send the team is always uploaded to Deferno so we can see it.)
Save the original voice recording on this device when you accept a brain dump, so you can listen back later.
Keeps files on this device; works offline
Reorder tasks by dragging. This is still being polished.
Shake your phone to undo the last task move. You'll be asked to confirm first.
This space is reserved — its features arrive in an upcoming release.
This space is reserved — its desktop view arrives in an upcoming release.
Speak or type — sorts to Inbox
The shell overlay route is wired — Search and New render real content over it.
This surface arrives on desktop in an upcoming release.
You're offline — blockers can't be changed right now.
That change was rejected — it would create a dependency cycle or cross organizations.
Couldn't load comments. Pull to refresh later.
This task may have been removed. Head back to your list.
Pick a task on the left to see its details here.
When you add a tree, it shows up here. One small step at a time.
Everything here is done. Switch to “All” to see it again.
This also unblocks the items it currently gates.
Self-update is available in the installed app
Updates are managed by your package manager
I can find things, make changes, and help you plan.
The connection dropped before the reply finished.
The reply timed out — it was taking too long to respond.
You're offline — reconnect to continue the conversation.
You've used this month's Assistant quota. It resets next month.
Something went wrong reaching the microphone. Try again.
Tap to record. We'll sort what you say into your Inbox.
Allow Deferno to use the microphone to capture a brain dump by voice.
We'll transcribe this in the background and drop the results in your Inbox.
Turn on Apple Intelligence in Settings to break a stuck task into smaller steps, all on-device.
Couldn't read the model's response. Try again.
The on-device model isn't set up yet.
Couldn't reach the model. Try again.
On-device (Apple Intelligence). Drafts are proposals — nothing is saved.
No tasks found in that transcript.
Your plan is clear — there's nothing to pick right now.
You're in charge. Here's one idea at a time — keep what feels doable, skip the rest.
Your tasks stay safe in Deferno. You can sign back in with your token anytime.
Your token needs a refresh. Sign in again to continue.
Check your connection and try again — nothing was lost.
Tap the active account to view its profile, or another to switch. Each account's data stays separate on this device.
This is on the way. Thanks for your patience.
Export your tasks and lists as a backup file you can save or share — or import one to restore them.
Your data is yours. Export or import it anytime on the web.
That backup had no items to import.
This backup needs a newer version of Deferno. Update the app to import it.
This backup is too old to import.
Couldn't read this file — it doesn't look like a Deferno backup.
Deferno is open source under the Apache 2.0 license.
Get a notification when your drafts are ready to review — tapping it opens the Inbox.
Notify me when a brain dump is ready
Keep done items visible — on the dashboard
Dictation uses an on-device speech engine. There isn't one available on this device yet.
Find the items with the largest attachments, across everything — searched on this device.
New attachments are kept on this device. Other providers are coming later.
Recordings you kept when accepting a brain dump. Tap one to open its task — or the Inbox if it's still to review.
This area is on the way.
No tree matches your search. Clear it to see them all.

plurals.name: settings_import_restored
plurals.item: Restored 1 item. It'll sync when you're back online.
Restored %1$d items. They'll sync when you're back online.

resources.string: Apple Intelligence isn't available on this Mac.
Tell us what's working and what isn't.
